text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I win a Triple Crown race, they won't be able to
ignore my skills, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm done with being called pretty. I want them to call me strong.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: First up, I'm gonna win the Satsuki Sho!
choice_data_list: Let's show the world what you can do!
